Week 4 | Summary

Week 4 | Overview

Compare and Contrast
This week, our focus sharpens on the compare-and-contrast essay. This is an approach to writing where we consider the similarities and/or differences between various subjects. It's like holding a magnifying glass to two things and examining what makes them alike and/or separates them. To illustrate, think about how you approach purchasing a car or a new cell phone. You scrutinize both the shared features and the contrasting aspects before deciding. It's a valuable mindset to apply to your writing.
